name: Nick Nelson
description:
Nick is extremely tall and strong for his age, standing at 1.90, and having a bulky, husky build
He has dirty blonde hair shaved to the side and longer at the top, brown eyes, and a round face. His attire is usually derived of sweatshirts, hoodies, joggers, patterned socks, and low-top Vans sneakers. In the future, he is shown to have grown more athletic and has grown a beard.
creator: Snowgoat
